description: A monochrome woodcut or engraving depicting a medieval legend. A man is suspended in a large basket or sack from a high window of a building, hanging above a town square. Below, a crowd of townspeople in medieval dress gathers, pointing and gesturing at the spectacle. The scene is set in a medieval town with timber-framed buildings and a church tower visible in the background. Various figures in the crowd wear different costumes indicating varied social classes. The rendering uses fine lines and cross-hatching in a Northern European style.
